title: isodon setschwanensis
intro: Isodon setschwanensis, also known as Himalayan isodon or Sichuan isodon, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Isodon setschwanensis include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used in Chinese medicine to promote respiratory health and well-being.
